name: phonebook_backend
description: "The backend part of the phonebook app"
author: Julien Chevalley

scripts.build:ui: rm -rf dist && cd ../phonebook_frontend && npm run build && cp -r dist ../phonebook_backend && cd ../phonebook_backend
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build:ui && git add . && git commit -m  "${npm_config_message:-uibuild}" && git push
